heading: Art. 131c. Misprision of serious offense
label: 931c Art. 131c. Misprision of serious offense
notes: Effective DateSection effective on , as designated by the President, with implementing regulations and provisions relating to applicability to various situations, see and Ex. Ord. No. 13825, set out as notes under .Jan. 1, 2019section 5542 of Pub. L. 114–328section 801 of this title

children.text: who knows that another person has committed a serious offense; and
wrongfully conceals the commission of the offense and fails to make the commission of the offense known to civilian or military authorities as soon as possible;
